title: Senior Doctor - PGIMER Advisory Limited - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - PGIMER Advisory Limited - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Doctor looking for your next big career move? PGIMER Advisory Limited in Aurangabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About PGIMER Advisory Limited:
PGIMER Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PGIMER Advisory Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
